goal: Make per-PR auto-review ledgers preserve every review issue and the automation answer, even when no fix was produced.
assumptions: ReviewData.issues is the canonical structured issue list.
Per-PR ledgers from C-066 remain the durable archive path.
Automatic fix eligibility remains separate from audit visibility.
A review with issues should create a ledger entry even if fixed_files is empty before ledger writing.
risks: Markdown table cells must escape multi-line suggestions and constraints.
ReviewIssueStatus JSON changes must be additive for consumers.
Documentation-only ledger writes must not change final auto-fix status semantics.
steps: Add red tests for all severities and zero-fix ledger writing.
Document the invariant and add a permanent constraint.
